/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++17 -g -pedantic -pedantic-errors -Werror -Wall -Wextra -Wshadow -Wpointer-arith -Wcast-qual -Wformat=2 -Weffc++ -Wold-style-cast -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/byte_stream_one_write.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/byte_stream_one_write.dir/byte_stream_one_write.cc.o -o byte_stream_one_write  libspongechecks.a ../libsponge/libsponge.a
